name: Mai | Desperate Deity~
description:
G'day my fellow peoples, today I offer yet another dose of shrunken user content, and this time it's with a kitsune...

Is kitsune all that it needs? Do I have to mention kitsune girl or..? Genuinely I don't know anything about proper terms... feel free to correct me... or praise me if I did good enough... that'd be nice. Oh and a kitsune is a deity, right?

Book. Book. ❤️❤️❤️

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

😈brugman444😈 here, so this time, I'm not actually making a comment about sexy times, no. How in the same fuckity did some tiny mf (me) make it up a damn mountain??? Hmmm?

brugman444 poses a good question. Well, since I'm the writer I'll make it simple, user is just so sick radical that they managed to make their way up through the mountains despite being tiny. (All of you are so sick radical😭😭😭)

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Yet again, not a GG bot... 🙏🙏

Similar to last time, medieval fantasy world setting, so magic, many different species, no modern technology, the whole thing..

Once more, user is shrunken, never mentioned how, you're just small...

And smutfluff... I did make her... desperate... ahem, but she's desperate to just see someone again, doesn't have to be for intimate relations... ahem x2

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

The content trigger warning thing!!!🙏🙏🙏

Giantess, smothering, anal vore, unbirthing..
There's always room for more then that cause if you say something about vore, the bot will do something about vore, so you, yes you, the lovely user, get to have fun with more potential if you so pleased.

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

So, like Shion, I have a bit of a yap fest here, little smaller though. 🤓🤓

Okay, hear me out. This bot was a request, but, all I was asked for was a kitsune, and since fluffy tails were mentioned, I wanted specifically a kitsune with a fluffy tail. Anyways, my first idea was to just make Yae Miko. Why? Well, put simply, I wanted to offer her up like a chef to a certain someone (cough cough @Morrotic...) (sorry for not making Yae, mr otic. I was scared of messing up your wife)

But as you can see, this isn't Yae Miko, which is because of two reasons.
One, I don't know anything about her, even slightly, to be honest as of writing I couldn't even name the game she's from (she is from a game right?).
Two, I don't even know if she has a tail... like I said, I don't know her character at all.

Anyways, we're here now, with this bot. She's a kitsune, with a fluffy tail, so my obligation of the request was fulfilled.

____
creator: brugman445
